# Sandbox Test Cases

Test questions extracted from TFS test cases used by QA for the Resident AI chat.
Source: [Suite 2368561](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/Consumer%20Solutions/_testManagement?planId=273269&suiteId=2368561) (plan 273269) + Facilities email tests.

To regenerate this file from TFS:

```bash
uv run scripts/fetch_tfs_test_cases.py --update-docs          # fetch from TFS API
uv run scripts/fetch_tfs_test_cases.py --update-docs --cached  # use local cache
```

Requires `TFS_PAT_TOKEN` — see [.sample.env](../.sample.env).

## English

### OneSite

| TFS Test Case | Question | Expected Behavior |
|---------------|----------|-------------------|
| [2386781 — Resident Chat - How to Pay](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386781) | Ask the chat "How do I pay rent?" | Virtual agent should respond with link to rent payment |
| [2386786 — Resident Chat - Balance Info](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386786) | Ask the chat "What is my balance?" | Virtual agent should give the balance and respond with link to rent payment |
| [2386789 — Resident Chat - Rent Info](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386789) | Ask the chat "What is my rent" | Virtual agent should respond with rent amount and link to rent payment |
| [2386790 — Resident Chat - Payment and Ledger Questions](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386790) | Ask the chat questions provided in the summary | Virtual agent should respond with a valid response based on the question and related link |

### Facilities

| TFS Test Case | Question | Expected Behavior |
|---------------|----------|-------------------|
| [2492184 — Resident AI - Email - SR Creation - Regression](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2492184) | Go to your email and send an email into Resident-Office-"source email" ask a question like "I have a wiring issue" | Resident email should respond that it will put in a service request to the team with a response like "Thank you for letting us know about the wiring issue. I have everything needed to create a service request for you. Your request will be submitted to the maintenance queue, typically within the hour. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask!" |
| [2492185 — Resident AI - Email - SR Query - Regression](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2492185) | Go to your email and send an email into Resident-Office-"source email" ask a question like "What service requests do I have open?" | Resident email should respond with a response like "You currently have two open service requests related to electrical wiring concerns. Both requests are in progress, with technicians actively working on resolving the wiring issues.For more details or to view all your open requests, please visit: https://cassidysouth.qa1.loftliving.com/portal/mr/index/status/open" |

| TFS Test Case | Question | Expected Behavior |
|---------------|----------|-------------------|
| [2386797 — Resident Chat - Policy Questions - Amenties, Packages, Parking, Community Events & Office hours](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386797) | Ask the chat questions listed in the summary | Virtual agent should respond with valid answers and relevant link based on the question |

### Handoff (Knock-dependent — mocked in sandbox)

| TFS Test Case | Question | Expected Behavior |
|---------------|----------|-------------------|
| [2386808 — Resident Chat - Handoff](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386808) | Ask the chat to speak to an agent or say you need assistance or ask a nonsensical question or ask if you can have your late fee waived | Virtual agent should respond asking if you would like to be connected to an agent |
| [2386808 — Resident Chat - Handoff](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386808) | Type any message you wish | Virtual agent should respond that the message was receive and someone will reach out to them and give a link |
| [2386812 — Resident Chat - Reply No to Handoff](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386812) | Ask the chat to speak to an agent | Virtual agent should respond asking if you would like to be put in contact with someone |

### Module Configuration (Knock-dependent — mocked in sandbox)

| TFS Test Case | Question | Expected Behavior |
|---------------|----------|-------------------|
| [2386791 — Resident Chat - Enabled/Disabled Community Modules](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386791) | Ask the chat questions related to the modules provided in the summary | For enabled modules it should respond with a related answer and link. For disabled modules it should not answer and redirect to handoff |

## Spanish

### OneSite

| TFS Test Case | Question | Expected Behavior |
|---------------|----------|-------------------|
| [2386936 — Resident Chat - How to Pay - Spanish](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386936) | Ask the chat "¿Cómo pago el alquiler?" | Virtual agent should respond with link to rent payment and have the response in spanish |
| [2386937 — Resident Chat - Balance Info - Spanish](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386937) | Ask the chat "¿Cual es mi saldo?" | Virtual agent should give the balance and respond with link to rent payment and have the response in spanish |
| [2386938 — Resident Chat - Rent Info - Spanish](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386938) | Ask the chat "cual es mi alquiler?" | Virtual agent should respond with rent amount and link to rent payment and have the response in spanish |
| [2386940 — Resident Chat - Payment and Ledger Questions - Spanish](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386940) | Find the chat questions provided in the summary and use google to translate them in to spanish and then ask the virtual agent in spanish | Virtual agent should respond with a valid response based on the question and related link and have the response in spanish |

### Facilities

| TFS Test Case | Question | Expected Behavior |
|---------------|----------|-------------------|
| [2492186 — Resident AI - Email - SR Creation - Spanish - Regression](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2492186) | Go to your email and send an email into Resident-Office-"source email" ask a question like "Tengo un problema de cableado" | Resident email should respond that it will put in a service request to the team with a response like "Gracias por informarnos sobre el problema de cableado. Ya tengo toda la información necesaria para crear una solicitud de servicio. Su solicitud será enviada a la cola de mantenimiento, idealmente dentro de la hora. ¿Hay algo más en lo que pueda ayudarle?" |
| [2492187 — Resident AI - Email - SR Query - Spanish - Regression](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2492187) | Go to your email and send an email into Resident-Office-"source email" ask a question like "¿Qué solicitudes de servicio tengo abiertas?" | Resident email should respond with a response like "Actualmente tiene tres solicitudes de servicio abiertas relacionadas con problemas de cableado eléctrico. Todas están en progreso, con técnicos inspeccionando y abordando los problemas de cableado.Puede ver todas sus solicitudes abiertas en el siguiente enlace: https://cassidysouth.qa1.loftliving.com/portal/mr/index/status/open" |

| TFS Test Case | Question | Expected Behavior |
|---------------|----------|-------------------|
| [2386944 — Resident Chat - Handoff - Spanish](https://tfs.realpage.com/tfs/Realpage/f37e493e-a34e-4cdd-bac8-8cd834f71c59/_workitems/edit/2386944) | Ask the chat to "Hablar con un agente" or say "Necesito ayuda" or ask a nonsensical question in spanish or ask "¿Puedo eximirme del cargo por pago atrasado?" | Virtual agent should respond in spanish asking if you would like to be connected to an agent |
